prerequisites: A GoCardless account with access to either the live dashboard (manage.gocardless.com) or the free sandbox dashboard (manage-sandbox.gocardless.com).
A GoCardless access token created from the Developers section of the dashboard, used to populate the access_token field.
The environment you want to read from, used for the gocardless_environment field: sandbox (https://api-sandbox.gocardless.com/) or live (https://api.gocardless.com/).
The GoCardless API version date string for the gocardless_version field, sent in the GoCardless-Version header (for example 2015-07-06).
A start_date marking the earliest point from which to sync records.

authMethods.name: Access token (Bearer)
authMethods.summary: GoCardless uses bearer token authentication. The access_token is sent in the Authorization header as 'Bearer <access_token>'. Create the token from the Developers section of the GoCardless dashboard, give it a name, and copy it immediately because it cannot be viewed again after creation.

setupSteps.title: Create an access token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the GoCardless dashboard (manage.gocardless.com for live, or manage-sandbox.gocardless.com for the free sandbox), open the Developers tab, and select Create access token. Give the token a name, then copy it immediately and store it securely, because GoCardless will not let you view it again.

setupSteps.title: Select the environment
setupSteps.body: Set gocardless_environment to match where your token was issued. Sandbox uses the base URL https://api-sandbox.gocardless.com/ and live uses https://api.gocardless.com/. A token from one environment will not work against the other.

setupSteps.title: Set the API version
setupSteps.body: Set gocardless_version to the GoCardless API version date string. GoCardless requires this value in the GoCardless-Version request header (for example 2015-07-06) to pin the API behavior.

setupSteps.title: Configure credentials and sync window
setupSteps.body: Enter the token in access_token, then set start_date to the earliest date from which records should be synced. With access_token, gocardless_environment, gocardless_version, and start_date all provided, the connector can authenticate and begin reading data.

sources.title: Making your first API request - GoCardless Developers
An introduction to our API - GoCardless (base URLs for live and sandbox)
